spec_match.rationale: The profiler distinguishes LoAF entry fields from script attribution fields and avoids the nonexistent styleAndLayoutDuration shortcut.

interactive.rationale: Run all, clear chart, and the three individual scenario buttons update result cards and a live canvas chart.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The profiler now promises split fields when available and baseline combined fallback data when they are absent.

edge_cases.rationale: The chart does not treat absent origin-trial fields as zero style/layout cost and keeps fallback measurements visible.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5171478175809536.

design_system.rationale: The repaired page uses shared CSS variables and removes inline styles from the previous chart legend and table placeholder.

summary: Open critique items repaired. DevTools MCP verification exercised run all scenarios at http://localhost:3000/v147/long-animation-frames-style-duration/style-recalc-profiler/?verify=after-loaf-style-fix; the simple, complex, and cascade scenarios each produced result cards, and a canvas pixel check confirmed the chart rendered nonblank. Console and network were clean; conformance now reports 4 baseline PASS and 4 origin-trial FAIL in this browser.
